top3.sql:
SELECT b.bond_id, 
       CASE 
           WHEN m.label LIKE '%carcinogen%' THEN 'Yes'
           ELSE 'No'
       END AS carcinogenic
FROM bond b
JOIN molecule m ON b.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'triple';

SELECT bond_id, 
       CASE 
           WHEN molecule_id IN (SELECT molecule_id FROM molecule WHERE label LIKE '%carcinogen%' OR label LIKE '%Carcinogen%') THEN 'Yes'
           ELSE 'No'
       END AS is_carcinogenic
FROM bond
WHERE bond_type = 'triple';

SELECT b.bond_id, 
       CASE 
           WHEN m.label LIKE '%carcinogen%' THEN 'Yes'
           ELSE 'No'
       END AS carcinogenic
FROM bond b
JOIN molecule m ON b.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'triple';

SELECT b.bond_id,
       CASE 
           WHEN m.label LIKE '%carcinogen%' THEN 'Yes'
           ELSE 'No'
       END AS carcinogenic
FROM bond b
INNER JOIN molecule m USING (molecule_id)
WHERE b.bond_type = 'triple';

SELECT bond_id, 
       CASE 
           WHEN molecule_id IN (SELECT molecule_id FROM molecule WHERE label LIKE '%carcinogen%' OR label LIKE '%Carcinogen%') THEN 'Yes'
           ELSE 'No'
       END AS is_carcinogenic
FROM bond
WHERE bond_type = 'triple';

SELECT b.bond_id, 
       CASE 
           WHEN m.label LIKE '%carcinogen%' THEN 'Yes'
           ELSE 'No'
       END AS carcinogenic
FROM bond b
JOIN molecule m ON b.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'triple';

SELECT b.bond_id,
       CASE 
           WHEN m.label LIKE '%carcinogen%' THEN 'Yes'
           ELSE 'No'
       END AS carcinogenic
FROM bond b
INNER JOIN molecule m USING (molecule_id)
WHERE b.bond_type = 'triple';

SELECT bond_id, 
       CASE 
           WHEN molecule_id IN (SELECT molecule_id FROM molecule WHERE label LIKE '%carcinogen%' OR label LIKE '%Carcinogen%') THEN 'Yes'
           ELSE 'No'
       END AS is_carcinogenic
FROM bond
WHERE bond_type = 'triple';

final.sql:
SELECT b.bond_id, 
       CASE 
           WHEN m.label LIKE '%carcinogen%' THEN 'Yes'
           ELSE 'No'
       END AS carcinogenic
FROM bond b
JOIN molecule m ON b.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'triple';
